column1: This file is comma delimited and contains 8 types of records. The first comma separated field denotes the record type.
Valid Values for this first field are:
!UTMZone - the UTM zone of the coordinates in the file. Examples are3U
!CrossTrack - the specified distance off line permitted
The first field after the name is an attribute 0=unflown
The next field is the label for the entity.,,,,,,,,,",,,,,,,,,
The next field is the number of coordinate triples to make up the entity.
Any line that does not begin with one of these strings is ignored. So these field are excaped above using a !
